steps.title: Identify the explicit goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate WHERE the dicraeosaurid fossil was found. The answer must report the location from the notes: the Thar Desert in western India.

steps.title: Find the choice that names the location
steps.content: Only one choice actually states where the fossil was found. Choice A says it was found in western Indias Thar Desert — pulled directly from the relevant note.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'found in western India's Thar Desert': names the exact location from the notes; satisfies the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — 'oldest dicraeosaurid fossil ever recovered': describes the fossil's significance, not its location. Misses the goal. ✗
  • Choice C — 'part of a research team': describes the researcher, not where the fossil was found. Misses the goal. ✗
  • Choice D — '167 million years old': gives the fossil's age, not its location. Misses the goal. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
